modules.sql: SELECT CAST(t.account_id AS INTEGER) AS account_id, COALESCE(a.customer_id, 0) AS customer_id, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Debit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0.0 END), 0.0) AS debit_total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Credit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0.0 END), 0.0) AS credit_total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Credit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0.0 END), 0.0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.txn_type = 'Debit' THEN CAST(t.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0.0 END), 0.0) AS net_movement, MIN(t.as_of) AS as_of FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN accounts a ON CAST(t.account_id AS INTEGER) = CAST(a.account_id AS INTEGER) GROUP BY t.account_id
